description: Perform Single Cell ssGSEA. Can be used after Seurat.Clustering module.
author: Alexander T. Wenzel & John Jun
plan:
## Single.Cell.ssGSEA GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Single.Cell.ssGSEA is a GenePattern module that Perform Single Cell ssGSEA. Can be used after Seurat.Clustering module.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 5 parameters:
- Required: input_file, gene_set_database_file, output_file_name, cluster_data_label
- Optional: chip_file

### 3. Command Line
```
bash <libdir>sc_ssGSEA_driver.sh <input_file> <gene_set_database_file> <output_file_name> <job.cpuCount> <cluster_data_label> <chip_file>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: atwenzel/sc_ssgsea\:v1.3.0

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input_file
parameters.description: Input Seurat RDS, h5seurat, or h5ad file.

parameters.name: gene_set_database_file
parameters.description: Gene sets database from GSEA website. Upload a gene set if your gene set is not listed as a choice from MsigDB.

parameters.name: output_file_name
parameters.description: Base name of the output files to be saved.

parameters.name: chip_file
parameters.description: Chip file containing Gene ID to Gene Symbol mappings. Leave blank if the gene names are already in gene symbols.

parameters.name: cluster_data_label
parameters.description: Name of the label for cluster metadata. The default label is <seurat_clusters> that is generated from the Seurat.Clustering module.
